scripts.supabase:start: export $(grep -v '^#' .env.local | grep '^SUPABASE_' | xargs) && supabase stop 2>/dev/null; supabase start && devbox run db:sync
scripts.db:sync: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && supabase db dump --data-only --linked -p "$SUPABASE_PROD_DB_PASSWORD" -x storage.buckets -x storage.objects -x storage.s3_multipart_uploads -x storage.s3_multipart_uploads_parts -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && supabase db reset --local && psql -q postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c 'TRUNCATE trip_events, trip_days, trips, allowed_users, event_memories RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;' && psql -q postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && echo 'DB sync complete'
scripts.db:sync-staging: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && supabase db dump --data-only --linked -p "$SUPABASE_PROD_DB_PASSWORD" -x storage.buckets -x storage.objects -x storage.s3_multipart_uploads -x storage.s3_multipart_uploads_parts -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_STAGING_DB_PASSWORD psql -h aws-0-ap-northeast-1.pooler.supabase.com -p 5432 -U postgres.fowxrnfttrnvogssaqef -d postgres -c 'TRUNCATE trip_events, trip_days, trips, allowed_users RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;' && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_STAGING_DB_PASSWORD psql -h aws-0-ap-northeast-1.pooler.supabase.com -p 5432 -U postgres.fowxrnfttrnvogssaqef -d postgres -q -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && echo 'Staging sync complete'
scripts.gcp:api-usage:
PROJECT=project-05354bad-3017-42e9-b86 && TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) && START=$(date -u +%Y-%m-01T00:00:00Z) && END=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT23:59:59Z) && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" "https://monitoring.googleapis.com/v3/projects/$PROJECT/timeSeries?filter=metric.type%3D%22serviceruntime.googleapis.com%2Fapi%2Frequest_count%22&interval.startTime=$START&interval.endTime=$END&aggregation.alignmentPeriod=2592000s&aggregation.perSeriesAligner=ALIGN_SUM&aggregation.crossSeriesReducer=REDUCE_SUM&aggregation.groupByFields=resource.labels.service" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
PRICE={'distance-matrix-backend.googleapis.com':5,'places-backend.googleapis.com':17,'places.googleapis.com':5,'maps-backend.googleapis.com':7,'routes.googleapis.com':5}
FREE=200
data=json.load(sys.stdin)
if 'timeSeries' not in data: print('No usage data found'); sys.exit()
total=0
print(f'{\"Service\":<45} {\"Requests\":>10} {\"Cost (USD)\":>12} {\"Free Tier\":>12}')
print('-'*82)
for ts in sorted(data['timeSeries'],key=lambda t:t['resource']['labels']['service']):
  svc=ts['resource']['labels']['service']
  cnt=int(ts['points'][0]['value'].get('int64Value','0'))
  rate=PRICE.get(svc,10)
  cost=cnt*rate/1000
  free=int(FREE/rate*1000)
  total+=cost
  print(f'{svc:<45} {cnt:>10,} {cost:>11.2f}$ {free:>11,}')
print('-'*82)
print(f'{\"\":<45} {\"\":>10} {total:>11.2f}$ / {FREE}.00$ free')
"
